import React, { useState } from "react"; import "./AdminDashboard.css"; import { LineChart, Line, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip as RechartsTooltip, ResponsiveContainer, PieChart, Pie, Cell, Legend } from 'recharts'; import { IndianRupee, Users, Ticket, Crown, CheckCircle, Plus, Download, AlertCircle, Search, Filter, MoreVertical, X, User, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, UserX, Unlock, LogOut, Video, Calendar, Eye, Activity, Ban } from 'lucide-react'; const DUMMY_USERS = [ { id: 1, name: "Rahul Sharma", email: "rahul@example.com", plan: "Elite", joinedDate: "12 Mar 2026", webinars: 12, revenue: 45000, status: "Active", avatar: "R" }, { id: 2, name: "Anjali Singh", email: "anjali@example.com", plan: "Pro", joinedDate: "10 Mar 2026", webinars: 5, revenue: 15000, status: "Active", avatar: "A" }, { id: 3, name: "Vikram Verma", email: "vikram@example.com", plan: "Basic", joinedDate: "05 Mar 2026", webinars: 2, revenue: 1400, status: "Suspended", avatar: "V" }, { id: 4, name: "Priya Patel", email: "priya@example.com", plan: "Elite", joinedDate: "01 Mar 2026", webinars: 8, revenue: 32000, status: "Active", avatar: "P" }, { id: 5, name: "Amit Kumar", email: "amit.k@example.com", plan: "Free", joinedDate: "28 Feb 2026", webinars: 0, revenue: 0, status: "Active", avatar: "A" }, { id: 6, name: "Neha Gupta", email: "neha@example.com", plan: "Pro", joinedDate: "25 Feb 2026", webinars: 4, revenue: 11000, status: "Active", avatar: "N" }, { id: 7, name: "Suresh Rao", email: "suresh@example.com", plan: "Basic", joinedDate: "20 Feb 2026", webinars: 1, revenue: 699, status: "Payment Failed", avatar: "S" }, { id: 8, name: "Anita Bose", email: "anita.b@example.com", plan: "Free", joinedDate: "18 Feb 2026", webinars: 0, revenue: 0, status: "Inactive", avatar: "A" }, { id: 9, name: "Kunal Ghosh", email: "kunal@example.com", plan: "Elite", joinedDate: "15 Feb 2026", webinars: 15, revenue: 60000, status: "Active", avatar: "K" }, { id: 10, name: "Deepak Chahar", email: "deepak@example.com", plan: "Pro", joinedDate: "10 Feb 2026", webinars: 3, revenue: 8000, status: "Active", avatar: "D" }, { id: 11, name: "Sneha Reddy", email: "sneha@example.com", plan: "Basic", joinedDate: "05 Feb 2026", webinars: 1, revenue: 699, status: "Active", avatar: "S" }, { id: 12, name: "Rohit Dhawan", email: "rohit.d@example.com", plan: "Elite", joinedDate: "01 Feb 2026", webinars: 9, revenue: 38000, status: "Active", avatar: "R" }, ]; const DUMMY_WEBINARS = [ { id: 1, title: "React Masterclass 2026", category: "Technology", creator: "Rahul Sharma", creatorEmail: "rahul@example.com", date: "15 Mar 2026", time: "02:00 PM", type: "Paid", price: 999, revenue: 44955, filled: 45, totalSeats: 100, status: "Upcoming", img: "" }, { id: 2, title: "Digital Marketing Secrets", category: "Marketing", creator: "Anjali Singh", creatorEmail: "anjali@example.com", date: "12 Mar 2026", time: "06:00 PM", type: "Paid", price: 1499, revenue: 119920, filled: 80, totalSeats: 100, status: "Live Now", img: "" }, { id: 3, title: "Yoga for Beginners", category: "Health", creator: "Priya Patel", creatorEmail: "priya@example.com", date: "10 Mar 2026", time: "07:00 AM", type: "Free", price: 0, revenue: 0, filled: 200, totalSeats: 200, status: "Completed", img: "" }, { id: 4, title: "Advanced Node.js Scaling", category: "Technology", creator: "Rahul Sharma", creatorEmail: "rahul@example.com", date: "20 Mar 2026", time: "05:00 PM", type: "Paid", price: 1999, revenue: 19990, filled: 10, totalSeats: 50, status: "Upcoming", img: "" }, { id: 5, title: "Personal Finance 101", category: "Finance", creator: "Kunal Ghosh", creatorEmail: "kunal@example.com", date: "08 Mar 2026", time: "04:00 PM", type: "Paid", price: 499, revenue: 49900, filled: 100, totalSeats: 100, status: "Completed", img: "" }, { id: 6, title: "UI/UX Design Trends", category: "Design", creator: "Neha Gupta", creatorEmail: "neha@example.com", date: "16 Mar 2026", time: "03:00 PM", type: "Free", price: 0, revenue: 0, filled: 150, totalSeats: 500, status: "Upcoming", img: "" }, { id: 7, title: "Crypto Investing Guide", category: "Finance", creator: "Vikram Verma", creatorEmail: "vikram@example.com", date: "22 Mar 2026", time: "08:00 PM", type: "Paid", price: 2999, revenue: 0, filled: 0, totalSeats: 50, status: "Draft", img: "" }, { id: 8, title: "Fitness Bootcamp", category: "Health", creator: "Rohit Dhawan", creatorEmail: "rohit.d@example.com", date: "13 Mar 2026", time: "06:00 AM", type: "Free", price: 0, revenue: 0, filled: 120, totalSeats: 200, status: "Upcoming", img: "" }, ]; const AdminDashboard = () => { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("dashboard"); const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(""); const [planFilter, setPlanFilter] = useState("All"); const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState("All"); const [selectedUser, setSelectedUser] = useState(null); // Webinar State const [webinarSearch, setWebinarSearch] = useState(""); const [webinarStatus, setWebinarStatus] = useState("All"); const [webinarType, setWebinarType] = useState("All"); const [webinarCategory, setWebinarCategory] = useState("All"); const [selectedWebinar, setSelectedWebinar] = useState(null); const [currentWebinarPage, setCurrentWebinarPage] = useState(1); const webinarsPerPage = 5; const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(1); const usersPerPage = 5; const renderContent = () => { switch (activeTab) { case "dashboard": const revenueData = [ { name: '1 Mar', revenue: 4000 }, { name: '5 Mar', revenue: 8000 }, { name: '10 Mar', revenue: 6000 }, { name: '15 Mar', revenue: 12000 }, { name: '20 Mar', revenue: 18000 }, { name: '25 Mar', revenue: 15000 }, { name: '30 Mar', revenue: 22000 }, ]; const subscriptionData = [ { name: '₹699 Plan', value: 400 }, { name: '₹1499 Plan', value: 300 }, { name: '₹1999 Plan', value: 100 }, ]; const COLORS = ['#3b82f6', '#8b5cf6', '#ec4899']; return (

import "./LandingPage.css"; import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import { useState } from "react"; import { useEffect } from "react"; const LandingPage = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); const creators = Array.from({ length: 20 }, (_, i) => i + 1); const [rotation, setRotation] = useState(0); const [activeCard, setActiveCard] = useState(null); const toggleCard = (id) => { setActiveCard(activeCard === id ? null : id); }; useEffect(() => { const sections = document.querySelectorAll("section"); const navLinks = document.querySelectorAll(".nav-links a"); const handleScroll = () => { let current = ""; sections.forEach((section) => { const sectionTop = section.offsetTop - 120; const sectionHeight = section.clientHeight; if (window.scrollY >= sectionTop) { current = section.getAttribute("id"); } }); navLinks.forEach((link) => { link.classList.remove("active"); if (link.getAttribute("href") === `#${current}`) { link.classList.add("active"); } }); }; window.addEventListener("scroll", handleScroll); return () => { window.removeEventListener("scroll", handleScroll); }; }, []); return (

messages.message:
Error: Calling setState synchronously within an effect can trigger cascading renders

Effects are intended to synchronize state between React and external systems such as manually updating the DOM, state management libraries, or other platform APIs. In general, the body of an effect should do one or both of the following:
* Update external systems with the latest state from React.
* Subscribe for updates from some external system, calling setState in a callback function when external state changes.

Calling setState synchronously within an effect body causes cascading renders that can hurt performance, and is not recommended. (https://react.dev/learn/you-might-not-need-an-effect).

  24 |

> 26 |     setData(webinarData);
     |     ^^^^^^^ Avoid calling setState() directly within an effect
